subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest Thy Most Great Name and the Ancient Mystery beneath the shadows of sorrows, encompassed by hosts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری اسمک الاعظم و سر القدم فی ظلل الاحزان و احاطته جنود
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
